metadata.description: One-command Claude Code setup + a guided interview that builds your own personalized AI assistant — which then auto-forges custom skills for your work and sets up a second brain (English / Vietnamese primary; Thai, Korean, Chinese supported)

plugins.name: nick-starter
plugins.description: Starter kit: /onboard interview (EN/VI primary; TH/KO/ZH supported) that writes your personalized assistant (CLAUDE.md + memory), auto-forges custom skills for your profession and goal, and sets up an Obsidian-ready second-brain vault — plus core skills for memory, efficiency, leadership, and daily notes
